title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Luffy, York as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I went out of my way to tell you all about...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: ...The Stella's Betrayall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: you did do that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then again, you are vegapunk just as much as he is.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I had any interest in the void century,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why would I blab about it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It makes no sense!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's true...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, you've done well to survive this long.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Didn't CPO pay you a visit?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and what happened to the straw hat pirates...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since I'm the one calling you, I'll let you take a wild guess!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You do realize I have the Seraphim under my control, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that I survived the night shouldn't come as a shock!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway!! What's with this fleet you've got buzzing around the island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to wage war on little ol' me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: As a matter of fact, york...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've had a change of heart on that matter.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Am I right in thinking... that you are capable of replicating the mother flame alone?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh will you look at that! So you do want something from me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm glad I sent it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed, this is a special request we're acting on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A REQUESTZ FROM WHOMZ

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Either way, if that's what you want... the power station* I need to make it is here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just promise you won't lay a finger on me or my lovely laboratory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Very well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, I still want to be a celestial dragon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: that can be arranged.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Then you've got a deal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's just one other thing I need you to do first...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: SAVE ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy! Is here and he's going to kill me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Aaah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What the hell?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Please crush these PS!Chos!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "I see. Everything's finally coming into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I don't really get it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can just use her as a human shield to get away, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Does that mean we're under siege?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I drink next week

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So that's how it is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Grand Conspiracy has been foiled, and the crew's all together?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
